hotels.name: Hotel ELITE Rameswaram
hotels.description_fr:
L'établissement Hotel ELITE Rameswaram se trouve à Rameswaram. Il comprend des chambres familiales et une terrasse. L’établissement propose une réception ouverte 24h/24, des transferts aéroport, un service d'étage et une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite dans l’ensemble de ses locaux.

Tous les hébergements proposent un bureau, une télévision à écran plat, une salle de bains privative, du linge de lit et des serviettes. Vous profiterez de la climatisation et d’une armoire.

L'aéroport le plus proche (Aéroport de Madurai) est à 169 km.

Les distances indiquées dans la description de l'établissement sont calculées avec © OpenStreetMap.
hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodations: Hotel ELITE Rameswaram in Rameswaram offers family rooms with air-conditioning, private bathrooms, and city views. Each room includes a work desk, TV, and soundproofing for a pleasant stay.
Essential Facilities: Guests enjoy free WiFi, a terrace, and private check-in and check-out services. Additional amenities include a 24-hour front desk, daily housekeeping, room service, and a tour desk.
Convenient Location: Located on Rameswaram-Dhanushkodi Road, the hotel is 169 km from Madurai Airport. Nearby attractions include Dhanushkodi Beach and Rameswaram Temple.
Distance in property description is calculated using © OpenStreetMap
hotels.description_es:
Hotel ELITE Rameswaram se encuentra en Rameswaram. Este alojamiento, que cuenta con habitaciones familiares, también ofrece terraza. El alojamiento ofrece recepción 24 horas, traslado para ir o volver del aeropuerto, servicio de habitaciones y wifi gratis en todo el alojamiento.

En el hotel, todas las habitaciones cuentan con escritorio, TV de pantalla plana, baño privado, ropa de cama y toallas. Todas las unidades de este alojamiento incluyen aire acondicionado y armario.

El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto de Madurai) está a 169 km.

Las distancias en la descripción del alojamiento se calculan con OpenStreetMap©

Hotel ELITE Rameswaram localiza-se em Rāmeswaram. Apresentando quartos familiares, este alojamento também providencia terraço. O alojamento fornece receção aberta 24 horas, transfers do aeroporto, serviço de quartos e acesso Wi-Fi gratuito em toda a propriedade.

No alojamento, todos os quartos incluem secretária, televisão de ecrã plano, casa de banho privativa, roupa de cama e toalhas. Os quartos do alojamento incluem ar condicionado e roupeiro.

hotels.description_it:
Hotel ELITE Rameswaram si trova a Rāmeswaram. Dotata di camere familiari, questa struttura offre ai suoi ospiti anche una terrazza. L'alloggio prevede una reception 24 ore su 24, transfer aeroportuali, il servizo in camera e il WiFi gratuito in tutta la struttura.

Presso questo hotel, tutte le camere includono una scrivania, una TV a schermo piatto, un bagno privato, le lenzuola e gli asciugamani. Le camere presso Hotel ELITE Rameswaram includono l’aria condizionata e un armadio.

L’hébergement UKR Heaven Stay vous accueille à Rameswaram.

Proposant un accès direct à une terrasse, cette maison de vacances avec climatisation comporte 2 chambres. L’hébergement UKR Heaven Stay met à votre disposition un parking privé gratuit.

hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodation: UKR Heaven Stay in Rāmeswaram offers a holiday home with two bedrooms, two bathrooms, and a spacious living room. The property features air-conditioning and a terrace, providing a relaxing environment for all guests.
Convenient Facilities: Guests can enjoy free on-site private parking and a terrace, ideal for outdoor activities. The holiday home is equipped with modern amenities, ensuring a comfortable and enjoyable stay.
Accessible Location: Located 171 km from Madurai Airport, UKR Heaven Stay is situated on Veerapathira Swamy Kovil Street north. Reception staff speak English and Hindi, assisting guests with their needs.

hotels.description_fr:
L'établissement Hotel MG Grand se trouve à Rameswaram. Cet hôtel 3 étoiles propose un service d'étage et une réception ouverte 24h/24. Une terrasse, une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite et un parking privé gratuit sont mis à votre disposition sur place.

hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodations: Hotel MG Grand in Rāmeswaram offers family rooms with air-conditioning, private bathrooms, and free WiFi. Each room includes a work desk, TV, and free toiletries.
Essential Facilities: Guests can relax on the terrace or stay connected with free WiFi. The hotel provides a 24-hour front desk, room service, and free on-site private parking.
Additional Amenities: Rooms feature lake views, baths, showers, electric kettles, and wardrobes. Free toiletries and a work desk enhance the stay.
Location and Access: Located 171 km from Madurai Airport, the hotel offers easy access to local attractions.

hotels.name: Pennylane Hotel - Aesthetic Rooms with pottery studio, artshala, garden cafe, free airport pickup for 7 or more nights bookings
hotels.description_fr:
L’établissement Pennylane Hotel - Aesthetic Rooms with pottery studio, artshala, garden cafe, free airport pickup for 7 or more nights bookings se trouve à Rishikesh, à respectivement 29 km et 200 mètres de ces lieux d’intérêt : Temple Mansa Devi et Patanjali International Yoga Foundation. Il propose une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite, la climatisation, un jardin et une terrasse.
Vous bénéficierez d’une salle de bains privative entièrement équipée avec un bidet et des articles de toilette gratuits.
Un petit-déjeuner à la carte, anglais/irlandais complet ou italien est servi sur place.
Vous séjournerez à proximité de ces lieux d’intérêt : Himalayan Yog Ashram, Pont Laxman Jhula et Pont Ram Jhula. L'aéroport le plus proche (Aéroport de Dehradun) est à 19 km.
hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodation: Pennylane Hotel in Rishikesh offers aesthetic rooms with garden and terrace views. Each apartment features air-conditioning, a private bathroom, and a balcony.
Exceptional Facilities: Guests enjoy free WiFi, a garden cafe, and a pottery studio. The property includes a terrace, a work desk, and a balcony. Additional amenities include streaming services and a private bathroom with a bidet.
Dining Options: A variety of breakfast options are available, including American, Italian, full English/Irish, vegetarian, vegan, gluten-free, and Asian.
Nearby Attractions: Patanjali International Yoga Foundation is a 2-minute walk away, while Laxman Jhula is 600 metres nearby. Other attractions include Ram Jhula (1.8 km) and Rishikesh Railway Station (5 km).
hotels.description_es:
Pennylane Hotel - Aesthetic Rooms with pottery studio, artshala, garden cafe, free airport pickup for 7 or more nights bookings se encuentra en Rishikesh, a 29 km de Templo de Mansa Devi y a 2 min a pie de Patanjali International Yoga Foundation, y ofrece alojamiento con wifi gratis, aire acondicionado, jardín y terraza.
Todas las unidades tienen baño privado totalmente equipado con bidet y artículos de aseo gratuitos.
En el alojamiento se puede disfrutar de un desayuno a la carta, inglés/irlandés completo o italiano.
Cerca del alojamiento hay puntos de interés como Himalayan Yog Ashram, Puente colgante Laxman Jhula y Puente colgante Ram Jhula. El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto de Dehradun) está a 19 km.
A las parejas les encanta la ubicación — Le han puesto un 10 para viajes de dos personas.
hotels.description_pt:
Pennylane Hotel - Aesthetic Rooms with pottery studio, artshala, garden cafe, free airport pickup for 7 or more nights bookings localiza-se em Rishikesh, a 29 km de Templo de Mansa Devi e a 2 minutos a pé de Patanjali International Yoga Foundation, e fornece acomodações com acesso Wi-Fi gratuito, ar condicionado, um jardim e um terraço.
Existe uma casa de banho privativa totalmente equipada com bidé e produtos de higiene pessoal gratuitos.
Os hóspedes podem apreciar pequeno-almoço à carta, inglês/irlandês completo ou italiano no alojamento.
hotels.description_it:
Pennylane Hotel - Aesthetic Rooms with pottery studio, artshala, garden cafe, free airport pickup for 7 or more nights bookings si trova a Rishikesh, a 29 km da Tempio di Mansa Devi e 200 metri da Patanjali International Yoga Foundation. Prevede alloggi climatizzati con WiFi gratuito, un giardino e una terrazza.
Troverete un bagno privato completo di bidet e set di cortesia.
Presso la struttura potrete gustare una colazione à la carte, inglese/irlandese o italiana.
I luoghi di interesse più famosi nei dintorni di questo appartamento includono Himalayan Yog Ashram, Lakshman Jhula e Ponte di Ram Jhula. Aeroporto Internazionale di Dehradun si trova a 19 km di distanza.
Le coppie apprezzano molto la posizione: l'hanno valutata 10 per un viaggio a due.

hotels.name: Seventh Heaven Inn Rishikesh
hotels.description_fr:
Situé à Rishīkesh, à quelques pas de la fondation internationale de yoga Patanjali, le Seventh Heaven inn Rishikesh possède une terrasse et certaines chambres offrent une vue sur la montagne. Il propose un service d'étage et un restaurant. L'établissement est situé à 2,4 km de Ram Jhula et à 5 km de Triveni Ghat.
Toutes les chambres de l'auberge sont équipées d'un bureau. La salle de bains privative est pourvue d'une douche. Toutes les chambres du Seventh Heaven Inn Rishikesh comprennent un coin salon.
Un petit-déjeuner continental est servi sur place.
Laxman Jhula est à 8 km, tandis que Parmarth Niketan Ashram est à 16 km. L'aéroport le plus proche est celui de Dehradun, à 21 km du Seventh Heaven inn Rishikesh.
Les couples apprécient particulièrement l'emplacement de cet établissement.
hotels.description_en:
Situated in Rishīkesh, a few steps from Patanjali International Yoga Foundation, Seventh Heaven inn Rishikesh features a terrace and certain rooms offer views of the mountain. Offering room service, this property also provides guests with a restaurant. The property is located 2.4 km from Ram Jhula and 5 km from Triveni Ghat.
At the inn, all rooms come with a desk. The private bathroom is fitted with a shower. At Seventh Heaven inn Rishikesh, all rooms have a seating area.
A continental breakfast can be enjoyed at the property.
Laxman Jhula is 8 km from the accommodation, while Parmarth Niketan Ashram is 16 km from the property. The nearest airport is Dehradun Airport, 21 km from Seventh Heaven inn Rishikesh.
Couples particularly like the location — they rated it 9.6 for a two-person trip.
hotels.description_es:
El Seventh Heaven inn Rishikesh está situado en Rishīkesh, a pocos pasos de la Fundación Patanjali International Yoga Foundation, y cuenta con terraza y algunas habitaciones con vistas a la montaña. El establecimiento ofrece servicio de habitaciones y alberga un restaurante. El establecimiento se encuentra a 2,4 km del puente Ram Jhula y a 5 km de Triveni Ghat.
Todas las habitaciones cuentan con escritorio. El baño privado incluye ducha. Todas las habitaciones del Seventh Heaven inn Rishikesh tienen zona de estar.
El establecimiento sirve un desayuno continental.
Laxman Jhula está a 8 km del alojamiento, mientras que Parmarth Niketan Ashram se encuentra a 16 km. El aeropuerto más cercano es el de Dehradun, ubicado a 21 km del Seventh Heaven inn Rishikesh.
hotels.description_pt:
Situado em Rishīkesh, a poucos passos da Fundação Internacional de Ioga Patanjali, o Seventh Heaven inn Rishikesh dispõe de um terraço e alguns quartos oferecem vistas para a montanha. Esta propriedade providencia um serviço de quartos e um restaurante. A propriedade está localizada a 2,4 km da Ram Jhula (ponte) e a 5 km do Triveni Ghat (rio).
Na estalagem, todos os quartos estão equipados com uma secretária. A casa de banho privativa está equipada com um chuveiro. No Seventh Heaven inn Rishikesh, todos os quartos têm uma área de estar.
Um pequeno-almoço continental pode ser apreciado na propriedade.
Laxman Jhula fica a 8 km do alojamento, enquanto Parmarth Niketan Ashram está a 16 km da propriedade. O aeroporto mais próximo é o Aeroporto Dehradun, a 21 km do Seventh Heaven inn Rishikesh.
hotels.description_it:
Situato a Rishikesh, a pochi passi dalla Patanjali International Yoga Foundation, il Seventh Heaven inn Rishikesh offre una terrazza e alcune camere con vista sulla montagna. A vostra disposizione anche il servizio in camera e un ristorante. La struttura si trova a 2,4 km dal Ram Jhula e a 5 km dal Triveni Ghat.
Tutte le camere sono dotate di scrivania. Il bagno privato è completo di doccia. Tutte le camere del Seventh Heaven inn Rishikesh dispongono di area salotto.
Al mattino vi attende una colazione continentale.
La struttura dista 8 km dal Laxman Jhula e 16 km dall'Ashram Parmarth Niketan. L'aeroporto più vicino è quello di Dehradun, a 21 km dal Seventh Heaven inn Rishikesh.
Le coppie apprezzano molto la posizione: l'hanno valutata 9,6 per un viaggio a due.

hotels.name: Raj Cottage Ganga Vatika
hotels.description_fr:
L’établissement Raj Cottage Ganga Vatika se trouve à 28 km de ce lieu d’intérêt : Temple Mansa Devi. Il propose un jardin, un salon commun, ainsi que des hébergements disposant de la climatisation, d’une terrasse et d’une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite.
Vous trouverez une salle de bains privative avec une douche et des articles de toilette gratuits dans chaque logement, tout comme un sèche-cheveux.
Une aire de jeux pour enfants est également disponible sur place.
Vous séjournerez à respectivement 700 mètres et 2,4 km de ces lieux d’intérêt : Pont Ram Jhula et Patanjali International Yoga Foundation. L’établissement se situe à 18 km de l’aéroport le plus proche (Aéroport de Dehradun) et propose un service de navette aéroport payant.
hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodations: Raj Cottage Ganga Vatika in RishÄ«kesh offers family rooms with private bathrooms, air-conditioning, and free WiFi. Each room includes a balcony, terrace, and outdoor furniture.
Relaxing Facilities: Guests can enjoy spa facilities, a sun terrace, and a lush garden. Additional amenities include a lounge, outdoor play area, and yoga classes.
Convenient Location: Located 18 km from Dehradun Airport, the property is near Ram Jhula (8-minute walk) and Parmarth Niketan Ashram (1.4 km). Other attractions include Mansa Devi Temple (28 km) and Laxman Jhula (10 km).
Guest Services: The property provides private check-in and check-out, a paid shuttle service, and a tour desk. Free on-site parking and full-day security ensure a comfortable stay.
hotels.description_es:
Raj Cottage Ganga Vatika se encuentra a 28 km de Templo de Mansa Devi y ofrece jardín y salón de uso común, así como alojamiento con aire acondicionado, terraza y wifi gratis.
Hay un baño privado con ducha y artículos de aseo gratuitos en cada unidad, además de secador de pelo.
También hay zona de juegos infantil en el bed and breakfast.
Puente colgante Ram Jhula está a 8 min a pie del alojamiento, y Patanjali International Yoga Foundation está a 2,4 km. El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto de Dehradun) está a 18 km, y el alojamiento ofrece servicio de traslado de pago para ir o volver del aeropuerto.
A las parejas les encanta la ubicación — Le han puesto un 9,3 para viajes de dos personas.
Las distancias en la descripción del alojamiento se calculan con OpenStreetMap©
hotels.description_pt:
Raj Cottage Ganga Vatika localiza-se a 28 km de Templo de Mansa Devi e dispõe de um jardim, um salão partilhado e acomodações com ar condicionado, terraço e acesso Wi-Fi gratuito.
Há uma casa de banho privativa com chuveiro e produtos de higiene pessoal gratuitos em cada unidade, assim como um secador de cabelo.
Raj Cottage Ganga Vatika também disponibiliza um parque infantil aos hóspedes.
Ponte Ram Jhula fica a 8 minutos a pé de Raj Cottage Ganga Vatika, enquanto Patanjali International Yoga Foundation fica a 2,4 km da propriedade. O aeroporto é o Aeroporto de Dehradun, que está a 18 km de distância, e o alojamento disponibiliza serviço de transfer do aeroporto por um custo adicional.
Os casais gostam particularmente da localização – deram uma pontuação de 9,3 para uma viagem a dois.
hotels.description_it:
A 28 km da Tempio di Mansa Devi, Raj Cottage Ganga Vatika offre un giardino, una sala comune e alloggi climatizzati provvisti di terrazza e WiFi gratuito. C’è un parcheggio privato disponibile sul posto.
In ogni alloggio troverete un bagno privato con doccia, set di cortesia e asciugacapelli.
Presso questo bed and breakfast troverete anche un'area giochi per bambini.
Ponte di Ram Jhula è a 700 metri da Raj Cottage Ganga Vatika, mentre Patanjali International Yoga Foundation si trova a 2,4 km dalla struttura. L'aeroporto (Aeroporto Internazionale di Dehradun) è a 18 km di distanza, e per raggiungerlo c’è una navetta aeroportuale a pagamento organizzata dalla struttura.
Le coppie apprezzano molto la posizione: l'hanno valutata 9,3 per un viaggio a due.

hotels.name: Hotel O SEERA ELITE
hotels.description_fr:
L’établissement Hotel O SEERA ELITE propose des hébergements à Radjahmoundry. Cet hôtel 3 étoiles propose un service d'étage, une réception ouverte 24h/24 et une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite. Cet hôtel comprend des chambres familiales.

Tous les hébergements disposent d’un coin salon, d’une télévision à écran plat avec les chaînes du satellite ainsi que d’une salle de bains privative avec une baignoire ou une douche et des articles de toilette gratuits. Vous profiterez de la climatisation et d’un bureau.

L'aéroport le plus proche (Aéroport de Rajahmundry) est à 21 km.

Les distances indiquées dans la description de l'établissement sont calculées avec © OpenStreetMap.
hotels.description_en:
About this property

Comfortable Accommodations: Hotel O SEERA ELITE in Rajahmundry offers family rooms with air-conditioning, private bathrooms, and free WiFi. Each room includes a work desk, seating area, TV, and free toiletries.

Convenient Facilities: Guests benefit from a 24-hour front desk, daily housekeeping service, room service, and luggage storage. The hotel provides free toiletries, bath or shower, and tiled floors for added comfort.

Accessible Location: Located 21 km from Rajahmundry Airport, the hotel is situated in Rajahmundry Rural, East Godavari. English and Hindi are spoken at reception.

hotels.description_it:
Hotel O SEERA ELITE propone alloggi a Rajahmundry. Questo hotel a 3 stelle offre il servizo in camera, una reception 24 ore su 24 e il WiFi gratuito. Questo hotel offre camere familiari.

Tutte le camere presso questo hotel prevedono un’area salotto, una TV a schermo piatto con canali satellitari e un bagno privato con set di cortesia e vasca o doccia. Le camere presso Hotel O SEERA ELITE hanno l’aria condizionata e una scrivania.

Aeroporto di Rajahmundry si trova a 21 km dalla struttura.

Le distanze nella descrizione della struttura sono calcolate con © OpenStreetMap

hotels.name: Challa Residency
hotels.description_fr:
L'établissement Challa Residency se trouve à Radjahmoundry. Cet hôtel 3 étoiles propose des hébergements dotés de la climatisation, d’une salle de bains privative et d’une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite.

Tous les hébergements comprennent une armoire.

L'aéroport le plus proche (Aéroport de Rajahmundry) est à 15 km.

Les distances indiquées dans la description de l'établissement sont calculées avec © OpenStreetMap.
hotels.description_en:
About this property

Comfortable Accommodations: Challa Residency in Rājahmundry offers comfortable rooms with air-conditioning, private bathrooms, free toiletries, showers, and wardrobes. Each room includes a TV and complimentary WiFi, ensuring a pleasant stay.

Convenient Facilities: Guests can enjoy free WiFi, room service, and free on-site private parking. The hotel provides a welcoming environment with English and Hindi spoken by staff, catering to diverse needs.

Accessible Location: Located 15 km from Rajahmundry Airport, the hotel is situated in Rājahmundry, offering easy access to local attractions.

Distance in property description is calculated using © OpenStreetMap

Show me more
hotels.description_es:
Challa Residency se encuentra en Rajahmundry. Este hotel de 3 estrellas tiene habitaciones con aire acondicionado, baño privado y wifi gratis.

En el hotel, cada habitación incluye armario.

El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto de Rajahmundry) está a 15 km.

Las distancias en la descripción del alojamiento se calculan con OpenStreetMap©

No alojamento, todos os quartos estão equipados com roupeiro.

O Aeroporto Rajahmundry fica a 15 km de distância.

Presso questo hotel, tutte le camere prevedono un armadio.
